title: Detective Byomkesh Bakshy!
tmdbOverview: Byomkesh, fresh out of college, agrees to investigate the disappearance of Bhuvan, a chemist. Assisted by Bhuvan's son Ajit, Byomkesh links the case to a larger conspiracy that will unsettle Calcutta.
synopsis: Detective Byomkesh Bakshy! is a 2015 crime, mystery and thriller film from India. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
